name: think-like-a-monk
description: Jay Shetty's 'Think Like a Monk: Train Your Mind for Peace and Purpose Every Day' — a practical guide to applying ancient monastic wisdom to modern life, helping you find clarity, purpose, and inner peace.
useCase: Find purpose, manage negative thoughts, build daily habits, develop a growth mindset, and live a life of service — using monk wisdom from Jay Shetty.
knownRisks: Simplified spiritual advice — some may find it less rigorous than traditional monastic teachings
Strong self-help approach — may not appeal to readers seeking depth or nuance
Shetty's approach blends multiple traditions — not strictly from one school
